name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      commits_fixture:
        description: 'Path to a commits fixture file (under fixtures/)'
        required: false
        default: 'fixtures/feat-only-commits.txt'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  COMMITS_FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.commits_fixture || 'fixtures/feat-only-commits.txt' }}
  STARTING_VERSION: ${{ vars.STARTING_VERSION || '1.1.0' }}

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $result = Invoke-Pester -Path ./SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($result.FailedCount -gt 0) { exit 1 }

  bump:
    name: Bump version and generate changelog
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up package.json
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $v = $env:STARTING_VERSION
          "{""name"":""demo"",""version"":""$v""}" | Set-Content -LiteralPath ./package.json -NoNewline

      - name: Bump version
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $out = & ./bump-version.ps1 -PackageJsonPath ./package.json -ChangelogPath ./CHANGELOG.md -CommitsFile $env:COMMITS_FIXTURE
          $out | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }
          $versionLine = $out | Where-Object { $_ -match '^VERSION=' } | Select-Object -Last 1
          $version = ($versionLine -split '=', 2)[1]
          "new_version=$version" | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT -Append
          Write-Host "NEW_VERSION::$version"

      - name: Show resulting files
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host "--- package.json ---"
          Get-Content ./package.json
          Write-Host ""
          Write-Host "--- CHANGELOG.md ---"
          if (Test-Path ./CHANGELOG.md) { Get-Content ./CHANGELOG.md } else { Write-Host "(no changelog)" }
          Write-Host "RESULT_VERSION=${{ steps.bump.outputs.new_version }}"
